narrative_summary: Narrative=EVENT_CONTEXT_DOMINANT; direction=MIXED_OR_NEUTRAL; theme=REGULATORY_RISK; net_score=0.5351; risk=HIGH. محرک اصلی فعلی از sec_press_releases است: SEC Announces Roundtable on Preparations for 24-Hour Trading

top_drivers.title: SEC Announces Roundtable on Preparations for 24-Hour Trading
SEC Announces Departure of Principal Deputy Director of Enforcement Sam Waldon

alternative_explanations: The move may be explained by broad market beta or liquidity rather than the named event.
The observed event and price move may be correlated without a causal relationship.
An unobserved macro, positioning, or exchange-specific factor may dominate.
evidence_limitations: Fewer than two independent evidence sources.
Average source reliability is below the high-quality threshold.
Evidence strength measures support, not causal identification.
warnings: Market Narrative فقط روایت پژوهشی می‌سازد؛ سیگنال خرید/فروش مستقل نیست.
اگر event sourceها نویز HTML/marketing بدهند، v7 آن‌ها را فیلتر می‌کند اما همچنان باید source health بررسی شود.
Narrative wording is hypothesis-only because evidence strength is insufficient.
recommendations: automatic_event_collector_dashboard.py --compact باید قبل از market_narrative_dashboard.py اجرا شود.
